name: @ar.io/attestor-canonical
description: Shared, verification-pure crypto for ar.io escrow claims: byte-pinned canonical claim messages (cross-tested against the on-chain Rust), RSA-PSS-4096 verification, and Ed25519 attestation signing. Consumed by both the attestor and claims services.

scripts.test: node --test --import tsx src/verify-rsa-pss.test.ts src/canonical.test.ts src/canonical.cross.test.ts src/attest.test.ts
